name: Dr K. N. Murthy, IFS (Rtd)
title: Managing Director
credentials: Fellow, IIM Bengaluru • Former PCCF, Karnataka
bio: Former Principal Chief Conservator of Forests and Managing Director of Karnataka Forest Industries Corporation. A fellow of IIM Bengaluru with 30 years of service in Karnataka State (retired 2018). His expertise spans forestry, wildlife, climate change, business, policy-making, planning and project evaluation.

name: Krishna D Udapudi, IFS (Rtd)
title: Executive Director
bio: A postgraduate in Agriculture with a Horticulture specialisation. A forest officer with 30 years of service across Karnataka, with deputation experience in Irrigation, Urban Development, Rural Development and Tourism departments. Retired as Chief Conservator of Forests in 2018.

name: Dr G. Viswanatha Reddy, IFS (Rtd)
title: Executive Director (Projects)
credentials: Ph.D. Wildlife • Former Head, Rajasthan Forest Dept.
bio: Ph.D. in Wildlife and a postgraduate in Botany. Former senior forest officer and head of the Rajasthan Forest Department, with two years of international project experience in Indonesia. Previously Director of Ranthambore National Park for nine years and Chairman of the Rajasthan Biodiversity Board.

name: Dr D. A. Venkatesh, IFS (Rtd)
title: Executive Director
credentials: Ph.D. Botany • Former Commissioner of Textiles
bio: Ph.D. and postgraduate in Botany. A senior forest officer across Karnataka regions with extensive forestry and wildlife experience. Served four years as Karnataka's Commissioner of Textiles before retirement.
